emails.subject: Poker night
emails.body: Poker night Does anyone object to having poker night on the 13th? The 20th is very close to Christmas. Please respond ASAP. Thanks. This map is NOT to scale! <Embedded Paintbrush Picture>

emails.subject: FW: Poker night
emails.body: FW: Poker night Who is in and who is out? We need to know today, so if you are out we can get a replacement. Everyone, please respond yes or no. Thanks. To: Love, Phillip M.; Mills, Bruce; McLaughlin Jr., Errol; Winfree, O'Neal D.; Giron, Darron C.; Taylor, Joey; Ryder, Patrick

emails.subject: RE: Poker night
emails.body: RE: Poker night yes To: Love, Phillip M.; Mills, Bruce; McLaughlin Jr., Errol; Winfree, O'Neal D.; Giron, Darron C.; Taylor, Joey; Ryder, Patrick
